5.5e.description: While a creature is baned, whenever it makes an attack roll or saving throw, it must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the result. Baned creatures also have disadvantage on ability checks made to resist effects that would move it.

While a creature is blessed, whenever it makes an attack roll or saving throw, it must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the result. Baned creatures also have disadvantage on ability checks made to resist effects that would move it.
